content.query:
SELECT 
[Division]
,SetBy as Agent_EmployeeID
,count([AppointmentID]) as AppointmentCount
,min([ApptDate]) EarliestAppointmentDate
,min([SetDate]) as EarliestDateAppointmentSet
,min([VerifiedDate]) as EarliestVerifiedDate
,min([ConfirmedDate]) as EarliestConfirmedDate
,sum(case when [ApptSet] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ApptSetCount
,sum(case when [Verified] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as VerifiedCount
,sum(case when [Confirmed] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ConfirmedCount
,sum(case when [Issued] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as IssuedCount
,sum(case when [NetIssued] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssuedCount
,sum(case when [Sat] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SatCount
,sum(case when [Sold] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT]
group BY
[Division]
,SetBy
